tool_input.description: Get current branch and commits since main

tool_input.command:
gh pr create \
  --title "feat: hide free trial CTAs on plans page variants" \
  --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Filters out free-trial CTA blocks from plans page variants during hydration
- Added unit tests for the free-trial CTA filtering logic on plans variants

## Issue
Closes #5

## Test plan
- [ ] Server starts without errors (`npm run dev:server`)
- [ ] Client builds without errors
- [ ] Free trial CTAs no longer render on plan/pricing pages
- [ ] Unit tests pass for hydrate free-trial CTA filter logic
EOF
)" \
  --base main
